name: foundryvtt-mcp
description: A focused Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Foundry VTT v14 and D&D 5e over Socket.IO.

scripts.test: npm run build && npm --prefix sidecar test && node --test module/scripts/*.test.mjs
scripts.package:module: mkdir -p release && cd module && zip -r -FS ../release/foundry-mcp-bridge.zip module.json scripts -x 'scripts/*.test.mjs'
